articles.title: Petrol, diesel rates may ease as cheaper crude arrives, says oil minister Hardeep Puri
articles.description: India Business News: Union petroleum and natural gas minister Hardeep Singh Puri on Saturday indicated that petrol and diesel prices could be reduced if lower-priced crude.
